question: Can Alias Pack B achieve resolve>=85% without regressions?

p3a6_full_cert.note: Lower than diagnosis; likely bind fallback under provider pressure (rate_limit_hits=2) + name-path alias failures. Not a stable residual for designing B.

residual_fixtures_post_ac.warning: Already false-positive maps toward Gokulam / Naruto Tokushima — do NOT add fiction aliases

on_post_ac_residual.reason: zero alias residuals remain after A+C

on_name_only_fallback_stress.note: Only if fixture_id bind fails and traffic falls back to name resolve (UCL/UEL/BR short names)

recommendation: Defer Alias Pack B for resolve-gate. Prefer cert sampling hygiene (exclude fiction; optional exclude stale derby seeds) and harden fixture_id bind under throttle. Revisit B only for conversational name-only UX.
